releaseNotes: 🚀 INTRODUCING: Nexly Weekly Digest — A premium, 5-section intelligence briefing auto-generated every Sunday at 6 PM.
🧠 F1–F4 Intelligence Pipeline: Highly advanced algorithms for Trending Scores, Cross-Platform Deduplication, and Quality Ranking.
💎 Hidden Gems Discovery: New 'F3' logic surfaces high-quality content that hasn't gone viral yet.
📈 Emerging Topics: Intelligence engine now tracks keyword growth ratios to alert you to rising trends before they hit the mainstream.
✨ Cinematic UI: Implemented staggered list entries, count-up statistics, and premium Lottie-powered animations for a world-class feel.
🎨 Visual Polish: High-contrast Dark Mode (Deep Navy) and 'Paper' Light Mode for maximum readability.
🛠️ Platform Stability: Fixed navigation bar issues on Android devices and improved content matching accuracy across all 5+ sources.
